mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectProductListForMain */ SELECT P.ID AS id , P.PARTNER_ID AS partnerId , PC.CODE_NM AS categoryNm , PC.CODE_CD AS categoryId , P.PROD_CD AS prodCd , P.PROD_NM AS prodNm , P.PROD_TP AS prodTp , P.PROD_DET_TP AS prodDetTp , P.COMPOSITION AS composition , P.REP_FILE_ID AS repFileId , P.DETAIL_FILE_ID AS detailFileId , P.SIZE_FILE_ID AS sizeFileId , P.ETC_FILE_ID AS etcFileId , P.MAKE_YMD AS makeYmd , P.ORG_AMT AS orgAmt , P.SELL_AMT AS sellAmt , P.DISCOUNT_RATE AS discountRate , P.IS_SPRING AS isSpring , P.IS_SUMMER AS isSummer , P.IS_AUTUMN AS isAutumn , P.IS_WINTER AS isWinter , P.FAVORITE_POINT AS favoritePoint , FD.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm , (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT PD2.STNDR_COLOR, ',') FROM TB_PRODUCT_DET PD2 WHERE PD2.PRODUCT_ID = P.ID AND PD2.DEL_YN = 'N' AND PD2.SLEEP_YN = 'N' AND PD2.STNDR_COLOR IS NOT NULL AND PD2.STNDR_COLOR != '') AS stndrColors FROM TB_PRODUCT P JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD ON FD.FILE_ID = P.REP_FILE_ID AND FD.DEL_YN = 'N' AND FD.FILE_SEQ = 1 JOIN TB_CATEGORY_PRODUCT CP ON P.ID = CP.PRODUCT_ID AND CP.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND CP.DEL_YN = 'N' JOIN TB_PARTNER_CODE PC ON PC.CODE_UPPER = 'P0001' AND PC.ID = CP.CATEGORY_ID AND CP.PARTNER_ID = PC.PARTNER_ID AND PC.CODE_ETC = 'PROD' /* 시즌과 리사이클링 제외 */ WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N' AND P.SHOW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PC.CODE_ORDER, CP.SEQ

/* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectProductDetail */ SELECT P.ID AS id , P.PARTNER_ID AS partnerId , P.PROD_CD AS prodCd , P.PROD_NM AS prodNm , P.PROD_TP AS prodTp , P.PROD_DET_TP AS prodDetTp , P.COMPOSITION AS composition , P.REP_FILE_ID AS repFileId , P.DETAIL_FILE_ID AS detailFileId , P.SIZE_FILE_ID AS sizeFileId , P.ETC_FILE_ID AS etcFileId , P.MAKE_YMD AS makeYmd , P.ORG_AMT AS orgAmt , P.SELL_AMT AS sellAmt , P.DISCOUNT_RATE AS discountRate , P.IS_SPRING AS isSpring , P.IS_SUMMER AS isSummer , P.IS_AUTUMN AS isAutumn , P.IS_WINTER AS isWinter , P.FAVORITE_POINT AS favoritePoint , P.DET_INFO AS detInfo , P.THICK_TP AS thickTp , P.SPAN_TP AS spanTp , P.SHOW_TP AS showTp , P.LAUNDRY_TP AS laundryTp , FN_GET_CODE('90030', P.THICK_TP) AS thickTpNm , FN_GET_CODE('90040', P.SPAN_TP) AS spanTpNm , FN_GET_CODE('90050', P.SHOW_TP) AS showTpNm , FN_GET_CODE('90070', P.LAUNDRY_TP) AS laundryTpNm , P.TRANS_TP AS transTp , FN_GET_CODE('90060', P.TRANS_TP) AS transTpNm , FD_REP.SYS_FILE_NM AS repSysFileNm , FD_DET.SYS_FILE_NM AS detailSysFileNm , FD_SZ.SYS_FILE_NM AS sizeSysFileNm , FD_ETC.SYS_FILE_NM AS etcSysFileNm FROM TB_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_REP ON FD_REP.FILE_ID = P.REP_FILE_ID AND FD_REP.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_REP.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_DET ON FD_DET.FILE_ID = P.DETAIL_FILE_ID AND FD_DET.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_DET.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_SZ ON FD_SZ.FILE_ID = P.SIZE_FILE_ID AND FD_SZ.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_SZ.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_ETC ON FD_ETC.FILE_ID = P.ETC_FILE_ID AND FD_ETC.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_ETC.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE P.ID = #{productId} AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectProductDetList */ SELECT PD.ID AS id , PD.PRODUCT_ID AS productId , PD.PRODUCT_DET_SEQ AS productDetSeq , PD.PRODUCT_DET_SIZE AS productDetSize , PD.PRODUCT_DET_COLOR AS productDetColor , PD.STNDR_COLOR AS stndrColor , PD.SKU_DISCOUNT_RATE AS skuDiscountRate , PD.PRODUCT_DET_CNTN AS productDetCntn , FD.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN R.PLUSMINUS = 'P' THEN R.RECEIV_CNT ELSE -R.RECEIV_CNT END) FROM TB_RECEIVING R WHERE R.PRODUCT_DET_ID = PD.ID AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' ), 0) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(OI.QUANTITY) FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN TB_ORDER O ON O.ID = OI.ORDER_ID AND O.ORDER_STATUS NOT IN ('C') WHERE OI.PRODUCT_DET_ID = PD.ID ), 0) AS stock FROM TB_PRODUCT_DET PD LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD ON FD.FILE_ID = PD.FILE_ID AND FD.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE PD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND PD.SLEEP_YN = 'N' AND PD.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY PD.PRODUCT_DET_SEQ

/* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectRelatedProductList */ SELECT P.ID AS id , P.PROD_NM AS prodNm , P.SELL_AMT AS sellAmt , P.DISCOUNT_RATE AS discountRate , FD.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm FROM TB_CONTENTS_PRODUCT CP -- ① 현재 상품의 카테고리 JOIN TB_PRODUCT P ON P.ID = CP.PRODUCT_ID AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD ON FD.FILE_ID = P.REP_FILE_ID AND FD.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE CP.CONTENTS_ID IN (SELECT X.CONTENTS_ID D FROM TB_CONTENTS_PRODUCT X WHERE X.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND X.DEL_YN = 'N') ORDER BY p.FAVORITE_POINT DESC LIMIT 10
